author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Minecraft - Chaos Cubed Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/minecraft/

Chaos Cubed has landed in Minecraft! Hunt for vibrant sulfur springs in the Overworld to discover a striking cave biome hidden below. Swim in bubbling sulfur pools if you dare, build with colorful cinnabar and sulfur, but best of all – uncover the sulfur cube’s relentless appetite for blocks! From bouncing and sliding to explosive surprises, this unpredictable mob unlocks exciting new ways to build, compete, and survive depending on what you feed it. Chaos is only a block away in our newest drop. Play today in Minecraft! 

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #minecraft

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Copa City - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10011541

Forget the dugout. Take charge of the streets. Copa City is officially OUT NOW on PlayStation 5!

Get ready for the world’s first football tycoon game where you don’t manage the squad - you manage everything else. As the City Captain, the entire city is your canvas. You’ll be adapting the stadium, building fan zones, managing safety, and running the whole show for a global fanbase before the opening whistle even blows.

#ps5 #ps5games #copacity

Unravel the hidden powers of the cosmos in Age of Wonders 4: Secrets of the Archmages! Follow Athla's Wizard Kings through the Astral Sea, and face the perils they left behind. Contains 3 story realms, 6 new tomes, a new form, and new world map content.

Jurassic World Evolution 3: Rebirth Expansion – OUT NOW

Inspired by Jurassic World Rebirth, push the boundaries of science and develop the top-secret facility on Île Saint-Hubert before its downfall in 2010. Experience a blockbuster campaign, come face-to-face with four new dinosaurs, and develop your facilities with science expanding features!

https://store.playstation.com/concept/10018182

🚀 IT'S OFFICIAL! THE PLANET CRAFTER IS COMING TO PS5! 🌍

Crash-land on a hostile world. Gather, build your base, and generate the oxygen, heat and pressure to turn barren rock into a living, breathing planet. Do it solo, or bring friends along in online co-op.

The space survival open-world terraforming game you've been waiting for lands on PlayStation 5 on July 21.

A whole world is waiting for you to bring it to life. 💧🌱

text:
Marathon - Vandal Shell Cinematic | PS5 & PC Games
Play Now: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marathon/ 

VANDAL SHELL // COMBAT ANARCHIST
CYBERNETICS TUNED, READY TO RUN  

Scavenge the lost colony of Tau Ceti IV in Marathon, the survival extraction FPS from the creators of Halo and Destiny.

Play Now:
PlayStation 5: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marathon/ 

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=viRUy09SHrg
Runner shells are gameplay archetypes you can customize using the weapons, mods, cores, and implants you find on your runs.

Follow Marathon:
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@marathonthegame
Instagram: https://instagram.com/marathonthegame
Twitter: https://x.com/marathonthegame
Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/marathonthegame.bungie.net
Discord: https://discord.gg/marathonthegame

Explore the lost colony of Tau Ceti IV, scavenging valuable loot in a high-stakes survival first person shooter from the creators of Halo and Destiny.  

Infiltrate the dark sci-fi world of Marathon filled with rival players, enemy forces, and unpredictable dangers. Scavenge its maps alone or with a crew, then fight your way to extraction in tense, high-stakes PVP and PVE battles.

#ps5 #ps5games #pcgames #marathon

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Warframe - Jade Shadows: Constellations Gameplay Trailer | PS5 Games
***Warning: Significant spoilers for the original Jade Shadows Quest follow!*** 

Consequences continue in Jade Shadows: Constellations with a new cinematic Quest that picks up where 2024's fan-favorite update, Jade Shadows, left off.

Reassume control of the Stalker as he allies once more with the Tenno to navigate a conflict of celestial proportions. His dueling sons from parallel futures have come to the Origin System in search of their father, and will stop at nothing to claim him for their respective timelines. 

Constituting the first dual Warframe, Sirius & Orion jockey for position on the battlefield and can be switched on the fly for maximum destruction. They debut alongside their mentors — the silently lethal Ryoku (Ash Protoframe) and bloodthirsty Vena (Garuda Protoframe), who share a murderous rivalry of their own. After completing the Quest, you join them in the Uranus Proxima for spectacular ship-to-ship combat in our most accessible Railjack Missions yet.

Our latest update also includes the release of Styanax Prime Access and Dante Tytonis, along with new Incarnons, Signas, Operator/Drifter hairstyles, Arcanes, Augments and Atragraphs.

►► WHAT IS WARFRAME? 

Join 90M+ registered players in Warframe, a cooperative, free-to-play third-person looter shooter set in a constantly evolving sci-fi universe. 

#ps5 #ps5games #Warframe

Rated Mature
